content: Next.js App Router health check: create app/api/health/route.ts with export const runtime = 'nodejs' and export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'. Try a real DB query (e.g., db.select().from(table).limit(1)) in try-catch. Return 200 with {ok:true, checks:{db:'ok',relay:'ok'}} on success, 503 on failure. Set Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store. Check relay via HTTP GET with 3-second AbortController timeout. This project's gateway has /healthz already at cloud-mcp-gateway level.
